description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OSW-FEATURE-test that runs on workflow dispatch, push, and pull requests to master and develop branches. The workflow has two jobs: Find-feature and build-OSW. The Find-feature job checks out the repository, retrieves feature, default model, and default language outputs using scripts. The build-OSW job depends on Find-feature, uses a matrix strategy with feature, model, and language inputs, checks out the repository, caches pip and PlatformIO, installs swig and PlatformIO, and compiles the code with a Python script.
